data.content:
## Implementation Plan

### Prerequisites (already satisfied)
- `typescript-eslint` v8.55 installed (via eslint-config-next)
- `@typescript-eslint/parser` v8.55 installed
- `tsconfig.json` exists at repo root
- ESLint v9 flat config (`eslint.config.mjs`) in use

### Step 1: Add the rule to eslint.config.mjs
- Import `typescript-eslint` (the v8 unified package)
- Add a type-checked config block for `src/**/*.{ts,tsx}` with:
  - `languageOptions.parserOptions.projectService: true`
  - `@typescript-eslint/no-floating-promises: "error"`
- No new dependencies needed

### Step 2: Fix existing violations (~10 instances)
All are intentional fire-and-forget — prefix with `void`:
- `src/lib/terminal-manager-take-prompt.ts:226` — markBeatShipped
- `src/lib/terminal-manager-initial-finish.ts:93,105` — regroomAncestors, updateMessageTypeIndex
- `src/lib/terminal-manager-take-child.ts:269,311` — two .catch() chains
- `src/lib/interaction-logger.ts:183,291` — writeLine, cleanupLogs
- `src/app/api/beats/[id]/route.ts:131` — regroomAncestors
- `src/components/beat-detail.tsx:211,218` — onUpdate .catch()
- React hooks with .then() chains (clipboard, fetches) — ~6 instances

### Step 3: Validate
- `bun run lint` passes
- `bunx tsc --noEmit` passes
- `bun run test` passes
- Measure lint time before/after (type-checked linting adds overhead)

### Complexity: Low
- No new deps, mechanical fixes, ~1 hour
### Risks
- Type-checked linting is slower; projectService mitigates this via caching
- Some Next.js config internals may conflict with explicit parser settings
